subject: biology
title: 22M.1.SL.TZ2.23
question_html:
Which factor(s) would favour evolution by natural selection?

I. Long lifespans

II. Favourable characteristics acquired by individuals during their lifetime

III. Variation within a species

A. II only

B. III only

C. I and II

D. I and III
examiners_html: The question did discriminate well. It was commented that the word ‘lifespans’ may be difficult for non-native English speakers.
